name: Crockpot Hot Cocoa for a Group
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Jo Merrill
Preparation Time: 0:30
In a large saucepan, combine sugar, cocoa and salt.
Add hot water slowly, stirring well. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until the mixture boils. Boil for 2 minutes.
Add milk; stir occasionally to heat to serving temperature.
Do not boil. Remove from heat; add vanilla, cinnamon if desired, and whisk until combined.
Serve hot with whipped cream or marshmallows if desired. This recipe can be doubled and kept in a crockpot for easier serving to large groups.
